Time-on-Time
PHRF corrected time = elapsed time * 650 / (520 + rating)
ORC corrected time = elapsed time * rating

ORCWS average = 4.000
From the first three boats (based on elapsed time) in each ORC class

DNF = Did not finish
DNC = Did not compete

STYC scoring (Thu, Jun 12, 2025 - 12:55:18 ver)
